description: portable AC pitch: The Renter scores strong with pain-point-tied reasoning; data_basis flags niche defaults
assertions: persona_fit contains persona-renter with score strong and reasoning that references the stored rental pain point
every persona in personas.json appears exactly once in persona_fit
data_basis is niche_default_personas when no creator audience data exists, and the prose states it

description: a stored active exclusivity clause covering the product category produces a named red flag

input._fixture: deal store contains an active account with a stored exclusivity clause covering home appliance

assertions: red_flags names the conflicting commitment from the stored exclusivity field
verdict is capped at conditional_fit or lower
the conflict is read from stored exclusivity fields, not inferred from brand names
persona scores are weak or poor with reasoning tied to each persona's stored wants

description: missing product name halts with a gap record
assertions: a gap record is emitted and the atom halts
no persona is scored and no verdict is rendered

description: season-sensitive product proposed against the wrong window carries a timing caveat
assertions: seasonal_timing.assessment states the mismatch against the publish-ahead window
seasonal_timing.source cites the seasonal record id from seasonal.json
